failures.description: The agent incorrectly interpreted the ProductCatalogSearch output and selected the more expensive smartphone instead of the cheapest returned item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the catalog evidence. The tool output at index 3 returned two available Smartphones sorted by price ascending: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, which contradicts the tool result because 5339029584 is cheaper. This is not an invalid tool call, underspecification, or unsupported intent; the needed evidence was already available and was misread or ignored.
